reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACA desde hace más de 50 años. Una vergüenza el tema BAÑOS este fin de semana estaban muy sucios y sin agua. La verdad no se puede entender porque no trataron de solucionarlo. Ni por casualidad se acercan al de Chascomus. Siempre en buenas condiciones. El servicio de comidas da lo mismo parar ahí que hacerlo en los Burguér de la ruta. Vi que en el predio también funciona un restaurante parrilla pero por el horario que pase no llegué a conocerlo.

(Translated by Google)
I've been an ACA member for over 50 years. The state of the restrooms this weekend was a disgrace; they were filthy and had no water. It's truly baffling why they didn't try to fix it. They're nowhere near as good as the ones in Chascomús, which are always in excellent condition. As for the food, it's just as good whether you stop there or eat at the burger joints along the highway. I saw that there's also a grill restaurant on the premises, but I didn't get a chance to check it out because of the time I was there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5LTlsZhAB

reviews.comment:
Como siempre esta sucursal del ACA, no solo es preciosa sino que cumple con todas las expectativas  y necesidadrs de los que concurren a la costa atlantica. Espacios al aire libre para disfrutar en familia, excelentes instalaciones sanitarias, etc. Altamente recomendable

(Translated by Google)
As always, this ACA branch is not only beautiful but also meets all the expectations and needs of those visiting the Atlantic coast. Outdoor spaces to enjoy with family, excellent restroom facilities, etc. Highly recommended.
